title: Only if
why.untouched: script.js is exactly as it was.
hint2.untouched: The discount is given every time. Try changing the cups to 3 and see what happens.
why.not-closed: A tag in index.html is open and never closed.
why.not-linked: The script never reaches the page.
why.crashed: Your code stopped with an error.
hint2.crashed: Look at the Console panel below.
hint2.no-if: The two lines with the discount should only run sometimes.
why.changed-data: You changed the number of cups.
hint2.changed-data: The data stays at 12. The code has to work at 3 and at 100 without being edited.
hint2.wrong-total: Twelve cups at three is thirty-six, minus five discount.
hint2.wrong-message: At ten cups or more it should say Free cup earned.
why.wrong-count: There are not two lines in the console.
why.lost-p: A paragraph has disappeared from the page.
blocks.0.text: A loyalty card. At ten cups or more the customer gets five lev off and a note saying they have earned a free coffee.
blocks.1.text: The code gives the discount. Every time. Change the cups to 3 and it will still give it — and three cups is not ten.
blocks.3.text: Until now every line ran. Every time, without exception. From here on a line might not run at all.
blocks.5.text: Inside the round brackets is a question whose answer is yes or no. If yes — the lines inside the curly braces run. If no — they are skipped, as if they were not there.
blocks.7.text: Remember true and false from lesson two? This is where they are needed. Whatever is inside the round brackets works out to one of the two, and that decides.
blocks.8.text: stock === 0 is not an instruction. It is a question: is the stock zero? The answer is true or false, and nothing else.
blocks.9.text: Code is no longer a sequence of actions. It is a sequence of decisions.
blocks.11.text: They say how far the condition reaches. Everything between them is inside, everything after the closing one is outside and always runs.
blocks.12.text: If you leave the braces out, only the first line goes into the condition. The second stays outside and runs in every case. The code does not break and looks right — it simply does something else.
blocks.14.text: Make the discount and the message happen only at ten cups or more.
blocks.15.text: Do not touch the data. Check your solution by changing the cups to 3 — then the total should be 9 and the message Thank you. Then put it back to 12.
